event: Angels descending to drive away a serpent in Purgatory (Dante's Purgatorio Canto 8)
symbols: serpent in the grass — the ancient tempter recurring even at the threshold of purification
descending angels with swords — divine protection against evil, echoing the cherubim at Eden's gate
lush garden — the Valley of the Princes, an antechamber to purgatorial ascent
two shadowed figures watching — the pilgrim soul guided through the spiritual landscape
description: A detailed engraving showing a lush, overgrown garden or valley. In the foreground, a large serpent coils among dense vegetation and ferns. Above, two radiant white-winged angels descend from the sky, their robes and wings streaming with light. In the middle ground, two shadowed human figures stand side by side, observing the scene. The composition is divided between the dark, tangled undergrowth below and the luminous sky above. Fine cross-hatching creates rich tonal contrasts throughout.
